title: [Cavernhold, Lake Shore]
description: This is the northeast shore of the lake.  A small stream runs silently across the sands of this area and effectively stops progress to the south.  The shore itself seems to be well travelled, though.

wayto.19992: ;e if GameObj.loot.find{|item| item.noun == "door"};fput "go door";else;fput "push stone";fput "stand" until standing?;fput "go door";end
